channel.title: TJ Palanca
channel.description: Personal website and blog of TJ Palanca. A quest to bring numbers and reality together, especially on issues surrounding the Philippines.

item.title: On Facebook News in the Philippines: Using topic modeling to find trends in online news coverage
item.dc:creator: TJ Palanca
item.description: Facebook has become one of most visible sources of news in the Philippines, and it has arguably played a huge role in shaping Filipino views. We take a look at how the Philippines news cycle evolved with by using topic modeling.
